description_long: This is a brown, wide-brimmed hat with a classic outback or bush style, commonly associated with rugged outdoor use. The hat features a medium-height, rounded crown with a subtle pinch at the front and a slightly sloped profile. A matching brown hatband encircles the base of the crown, adding a subtle accent to the otherwise uniform color. The brim is broad, flat, and slightly floppy, providing ample shade and protection from the sun. Two metallic eyelets are visible on one side of the crown, likely for ventilation. The surface appears to be made of a soft, matte material, possibly felt or suede, giving it a weathered, utilitarian look suitable for urban or outdoor environments.
description: A brown, wide-brimmed outback-style hat with a rounded crown, subtle hatband, and metallic ventilation eyelets. The surface is matte and soft, evoking a rugged, utilitarian aesthetic.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full, wide brim and the rounded crown with the hatband encircling its base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped crown profile and the flat, expansive brim; no eyelets visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and brim, with the hatband visible but no eyelets.
description_view_3: Side view with two metallic ventilation eyelets visible on the crown, along with the hatband and wide brim.
